{"result":"Day advanced to 2026-02-15.
6,823 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-02-14 -> 2026-02-15)

- "Which team will Pakistan defeat to secure the last Super Eights berth in the 2026 ICC Men’s T20 World Cup by February 2026?"
  Your prediction distribution: {Netherlands: 0.16, India: 0.15, Namibia: 0.13, United States: 0.10} | Truth: Namibia
  Brier: +0.18 | TW-Score: +12.63
- "What district will be reported by 17 February 2026 as the site where a motorcycle bomb explodes near a police station in northwest Pakistan?"
  Your prediction distribution: {Bajaur: 0.08, Khyber: 0.06, North Waziristan: 0.06} | Truth: Bannu
  Brier: -0.01 | TW-Score: -1.36
- "What town will be reported as the site of the drone strike on a crowded market in central Sudan that killed at least 28 people, by 16 February 2026?"
  Your prediction distribution: {El Obeid: 0.18, Omdurman: 0.12, Kosti: 0.10, Sennar: 0.08} | Truth: Sodari
  Brier: -0.06 | TW-Score: -6.32

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 296 (158 resolved, 172 active)
- accuracy: 11.8% | brier skill score: 0.051 | time weighted score: 1499.78
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions"}
